title: castilleja fraterna
intro: Castilleja fraterna, also known as Indian paintbrush, is a flowering plant native to the western United States and Canada. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. Castilleja fraterna can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for medicinal use, and it is also used in traditional herbal remedies.
